title: Ocean Rush
description:
Welcome in Ocean Rush, where huge ocean waves are always right behind you.

Your mission is to reach the rescue ship in every level before the wave catches you. Run through islands, railways, bridges, boats and dangerous platforms while avoiding different obstacles on the way.

Choose your favorite character and try to survive every escape. As you pass to other levels, the waves will become faster and the obstacles more dangerous.

Game Features:

• More than 15 levels

• Run away from huge ocean waves

• Reach the ship before it is too late
description_short: Ocean Rush is a fast-paced ocean escape adventure where every second counts!
